close_reason: Removed vestigial storage_teams code from data plane: FinalizationPlan.storage_teams field, key_or_range_to_tags/2, find_logs_for_tags/2, RoutingData.new/1 and helpers. Commit 3438abae.
description:
## Summary

Follow-up to bedrock-yerr: Remove dead code from data plane now that ShardRouter is the active hot path.

## Files to Modify

**finalization.ex**
- Remove `storage_teams` from FinalizationPlan struct (lines 118, 129, 150, 278)
- Delete `key_or_range_to_tags/2` function (lines 810-830) - test-only
- Delete `find_logs_for_tags/2` function (lines 832-841) - test-only

**routing_data.ex**
- Delete or mark `new/1` function as test-only (lines 50-62) - production uses `new_empty/0`
- Delete `build_shard_table/1` helper if only used by `new/1`
- Delete `infer_replication_factor/2` helper if only used by `new/1`

**Tests**
- Update finalization/data_transformation_test.exs to remove tests for deleted functions
- Or keep `key_or_range_to_tags` tests if they validate useful edge cases for ShardRouter

## Context

bedrock-yerr replaced the hot path with ShardRouter + ETS ceiling search. The old storage_teams-based routing code is no longer called in production but was left in place. This cleanup removes the dead code.

## Verification

- All tests pass after removal
- Commit proxy still routes mutations correctly (integration tests)
title: Remove vestigial storage_teams code from data plane
